purpose: Compose the optional developer balance panel through a scene-owned mount host and remove the remaining developer-panel composition responsibility from Main without adding a second diagnostics, cadence, or gameplay owner.

hot_file_changes.change: Add one DeveloperBalanceApplicationHost PackedScene under Main/RuntimeServices. Set panel_parent_path=../../RuntimeGameScreen/OverlayLayer/RuntimeSurfaceLayer and presentation_target_path=../RuntimeControllerHost/GameRuntimeCoordinator/DeveloperBalancePresentationTarget. Place it so its synchronous _ready runs before the Coordinator's existing deferred presentation wiring. Do not add another target or scheduler.

Delete developer_balance_panel, the _ready call to _build_developer_balance_greybox, _developer_balance_greybox_enabled, and _build_developer_balance_greybox. Do not retain a wrapper, fallback, dynamic callback, or extra refresh request.

After the production scene and negative gates pass, record developer_diagnostics_host as cut_over with the Host scene/script, old path deleted, duplicate execution checked, and integration commit SHA.
Record the production Host cutover, Main reduction, focused/MCP evidence, and both developer environment gates.

test_hot_file_changes.change: Require absence of developer_balance_panel, _developer_balance_greybox_enabled, and _build_developer_balance_greybox from Main.
Require exactly one production DeveloperBalanceApplicationHost with the two explicit NodePaths and no duplicate DeveloperBalancePresentationTarget.

forbidden: gameplay or save ownership in the Host
required_negative_gates: zero Main callbacks in the Host
required_tests_after_integration: tests/smoke_test.gd --check-only after the P4 smoke hot-file lease is resolved
